ShortDescription.Value: Easily update all placed buildings and assets in your city from any asset pack.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Asset Update Mod Easily update all placed buildings and assets in your city from any asset pack.
Best to be used when a pack gets a major update, this will force-update all assets in your city from that pack.
Use the dropdown and button in the Options page to access the update tool.
Publish.ChangeLog: # v1.1.1 ## Changes * Code cleanup, added github repo link.
